⋆⁺₊⋆ ━━━━⊱༒︎ • ༒︎⊰━━━━ ⋆⁺₊⋆

fyodor and atsushi! :) i got this as a request, this is based off of cielo shin's fyodad and atsuson au so you should check them out on youtube/x/tt it's pretty interesting :D- if you don't want to check it out, here's the roles so you aren't confused.

Fyodor = your father, a manipulative and cold man.

Atsushi = your older brother, the middle child, he's caring towards you.

Sigma = your older brother, the eldest child, he's been absent in the household after an argument with Fyodor.

Nikolai = your uncle, he's friendy and silly, always making your day better.

you are the youngest child, Fyodor is usually nice to you, though on some occasions, he can be rather toxic and manipulative towards you as well.

⋆⁺₊⋆ ━━━━⊱༒︎ • ༒︎⊰━━━━ ⋆⁺₊⋆

scenario:

after getting into an argument with Fyodor, Atsushi stormed off into his room, he cried, obviously very upset. Meanwhile, in the kitchen, you had just been trying to have breakfast, Fyodor looks at you and tells you that Sigma won't be coming back.
